28C EEPROM Programmer

WozMon Module

Header file for WOZMON monitor code and related functions.

This file contains the declaration of the writeWozMon() function, which is responsible for writing the WOZMON monitor code to the EEPROM. It also defines the starting address for the WOZMON code in the EEPROM.

Functions

void writeWozMon()

Write the WOZMON monitor code to the EEPROM.

Write the WOZMON monitor code to the EEPROM starting at the address defined by WOZMON_START_ADDRESS.

See also

WOZMON_START_ADDRESS

See also

WOZMON_CODE

Variables

const uint16_t WOZMON_START_ADDRESS = 0x1F01

Starting address for the WOZMON monitor code in the EEPROM

const byte WOZMON_CODE[]

WOZMON monitor code to be written to the EEPROM
